query:
-- Find billing item ST7906 and its linked services
SELECT bi.externalId, bi.invoiceDate, bi.invoiceNumber, bi.description, bi.lineAmount, bi.serviceExternalId, bi.matchStatus, bi.billingPlatform
FROM billing_items bi
WHERE bi.externalId LIKE '%ST7906%' OR bi.invoiceNumber LIKE '%ST7906%'
ORDER BY bi.externalId;
